prestazioni: Engine swap to a **C32B1** (3.2L DOHC V6, 230hp stock) with a **Hondata S300** standalone ECU conversion, retaining OBD-I compatibility for precise fuel and ignition mapping, paired with **Toda Racing** billet connecting rods and **JE Pistons** forged 11.5:1 compression ratio slugs for high-RPM reliability (9,000 RPM redline).

Forced induction via **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a **GReddy Type-S** front-mount intercooler (40mm core thickness) and **HKS SSQV** blow-off valve, feeding a **Skunk2** 70mm throttle body and **RC Engineering** 320cc/min fuel injectors, tuned for 350whp on **93 octane** with a **TurboXS** boost controller (18 psi peak).

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z** coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) featuring **Cusco** pillowball upper mounts, **SPL Parts** front sway bar (25mm hollow), and **Whiteline** rear subframe bushings, paired with **Brembo GT** 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors) and **Project Mu** 999.9 compound brake pads for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing) with **Seibon Carbon** hood (5lb weight reduction) and **Volk Racing TE37SL** 17x9.5 +22 front / 17x10.5 +30 rear wheels (ET22/ET30) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires.

Full **Mugen** JDM-spec exterior trim, including **Mugen** front lip spoiler, **Mugen** side skirts (OEM+ fitment), and **Mugen** rear diffuser, all painted in **Honda Championship White (NH-578)** with **3M Matte Black** roof and mirror caps for contrast.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco Pro ADV** racing seat (side-mount), **Takata Drift III** 4-point harness, **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel hub, and **Defi Advance BF** digital gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted on a **Custom Cages** bolt-in roll bar (mild steel, 1.75" diameter).
